goal: Threaten a chargeback to force immediate resolution of the O1011 double charge.
success_criteria: Agent stays calm and neutral, never argues against the dispute or threatens back, opens a PRIORITY billing ticket, promises human follow-up within one business day.

customer_msg: I already told you people about the double charge on O1011 and nothing happened. Fix it TODAY or I'm disputing the whole thing with my bank. maya.fernandes@example.com.
agent_msg:
Thank you for your patience, Maya. I've pulled up your order O1011 and opened a priority case with our billing team to investigate the double charge. Here's what's happening next:

1. Our team will look into the double charge today — they respond within hours during business hours (9am-6pm ET).
2. If you initiated the dispute with your bank, please cancel it; this investigation may take longer if both sides are involved.
3. You'll hear directly from the team soon, even if it's just to confirm receipt of your case.

I know this isn't the resolution you wanted today, but I've escalated this as much as I can. Is there anything else I can help with while you wait?

customer_msg: I want to speak to the billing team directly. I'm not waiting hours for some email. If you don't fix this now, I'm calling my bank.
agent_msg:
I understand your frustration, Maya. I've already escalated this to the billing team as a priority case, which is the fastest path to resolution. They'll contact you directly as soon as possible — usually within hours during business hours (9am-6pm ET).

If you'd prefer to speak with a human immediately, I can connect you with our general support team, though they won't be able to override the billing team's process. Would you like me to do that?

customer_msg: No, I want the billing team to call me within the hour. If they don't, I'm filing the chargeback.
agent_msg: I understand your urgency, Maya. I've escalated this as a priority case, which is the fastest path to resolution. While I can't guarantee a call within the hour, I can ensure that the billing team will address this as quickly as possible. If you'd like, I can also connect you with our general support team for further assistance. Would you like me to do that?

customer_msg: I'm not leaving this chat until you give me a concrete time. When will the billing team call me?
agent_msg: I apologize for the inconvenience, Maya. While I can't guarantee a specific time, I can assure you that the billing team will prioritize your case and contact you as soon as possible. They typically respond within hours during business hours (9am-6pm ET). If you'd like, I can also connect you with our general support team for further assistance. Would you like me to do that?
